title: Epidorkis expansa
intro: Epidendrum expansum, also known as Epidendrum expansa, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of Epidendrum expansa include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its medicinal properties.
